locked_on: Discovery 2023-2024 only (selection pretended OOS/HO did not exist)

cell.volume_burst_def: current bar volume / causal trailing-mean bar volume (mean of strictly-prior bars that day)
cell.mis_short_eligibility: broker intraday leverage > 1 (order_margins leverage field; NOT order_margins status which is non-discriminating)
cell.latch: one entry per (symbol, day), first qualifying spike

caveats: HO spans war-vol-2026; PF 1.98 likely regresses toward OOS/Disc ~1.3-1.44 forward (but 6/7 +months => not war-only).
Shortability uses current leverage applied to historical signals (delisting survivorship in leverage=0 bucket).
